name: Pinevale Settlements
short_description: Build a colony from scratch, set up production chains, and defend against raids. Manage resources, research technologies, expand your settlement, and survive each escalating wave!
detailed_description:
Pinevale Settlements is a colony-building simulator that blends production and defense. Start small, gather resources, construct buildings, automate production, research technologies, and keep your colony alive against ever-stronger raids.

Coming in full release:

- Build – Defend – Expand

  - Create production chains from gatherers to workshops

  - Defend against raids with walls, towers, and patrols

  - Use new structures and efficiency bonuses through research

- Dynamic progression and challenge

  - Mitigate risks in seasonal cycles, counter increasing threat intensity

  - Manage resource bottlenecks, plan priorities and stocks

- Manage your colony and improve quality of life

  - Balance production panels, track stocks, upgrade structures

  - Plan workforce assignments

- Begin exploration and expansion

  - Discover new regions, biomes, and opportunities

  - Make risk–reward decisions: safe production or rapid growth?

Roadmap from Early Access to Full Release:

- New maps, biomes, and game modes

- Expanded technology tree, more buildings and defense types

- Quality of life improvements, production balancing, and performance optimizations

Join us, write your settlement's story, and keep Pinevale alive!
